PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
  PsiElement(;)(';')
  PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
  PsiElement(;)(';')

    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
  PsiElement(;)(';')

    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('4')
  PsiElement(;)(';')
  PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('5')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('myClass')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiElement(;)(';')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"!"')
  PsiElement(;)(';')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')

        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
        PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
